text: As I step into this space, streaked with futuristic purple light and patterned walls declaring “R+D,” I feel anticipation hum beneath the surface. There’s a sense of curiosity and intent—an invitation to ponder the blend of technology and human experience. The displays seem thoughtful, urging me to reflect on the relationship between creation and observation. I feel engaged, as though on the edge of discovery, both an explorer and a witness in a place designed to provoke thought and wonder.
